picindex.COMMENT: can range from 0 to 8 for artists and services providers. index 0 pictures are considered display pictures and appropriate thumbnails are generated for those.

tag.COMMENT: internal, used to differentiate between profile photos,display pictures, scripts etc.

price.COMMENT: divide by 100 to get value in dollars.

cvalue.COMMENT: divide by 100 to get value in dollars.

tag.COMMENT: Tag can be, h-large, s-left, s-right

accountingmethod.COMMENT: Accounting can be, clicks, impressions, date
